inputs.label: Joist Spacing
inputs.businessContext: Center-to-center distance between joists in inches

businessContext_i18n.en: Center-to-center distance between joists in inches
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kirişler arasındaki inç cinsinden merkezden merkeze mesafe.

inputs.label: Live Load
inputs.businessContext: Design live load (e.g., 40 psf for residential)

businessContext_i18n.en: Design live load (e.g., 40 psf for residential)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım hareketli yükü (örneğin, konut için 40 psf).

inputs.label: Dead Load
inputs.businessContext: Dead load including joist weight, ceiling, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dead load including joist weight, ceiling, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiriş ağırlığı, tavan vb. dahil sabit yük.

inputs.label: Modulus of Elasticity
inputs.businessContext: E value for joist material (e.g., 1,600,000 psi for SPF)

businessContext_i18n.en: E value for joist material (e.g., 1,600,000 psi for SPF)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiriş malzemesi için E değeri (örneğin, SPF için 1.600.000 psi).

inputs.label: Moment of Inertia
inputs.businessContext: I value for joist cross-section (e.g., 47.6 in^4 for a 2x10)

businessContext_i18n.en: I value for joist cross-section (e.g., 47.6 in^4 for a 2x10)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiriş kesiti için I değeri (örneğin, 2x10 için 47,6 in^4).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
